fix.code:
import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n, m = map(int, input().split())
    grid = []
    for _ in range(n):
        row = list(map(int, list(input().strip())))
        grid.append(row)
    
    # prefix[i][j] = sum of grid[i][0..j-1]
    row_pre = [[0]*(m+1) for _ in range(n)]
    for i in range(n):
        for j in range(m):
            row_pre[i][j+1] = row_pre[i][j] + grid[i][j]
    
    # col_pre[i][j] = sum of grid[0..i-1][j]
    col_pre = [[0]*(m) for _ in range(n+1)]
    for j in range(m):
        for i in range(n):
            col_pre[i+1][j] = col_pre[i][j] + grid[i][j]
    
    # interior prefix: ones in rectangle
    # pre2[i][j] = sum grid[0..i-1][0..j-1]
    pre2 = [[0]*(m+1) for _ in range(n+1)]
    for i in range(n):
        for j in range(m):
            pre2[i+1][j+1] = pre2[i][j+1] + pre2[i+1][j] - pre2[i][j] + grid[i][j]
    
    def rect_sum(r1, r2, c1, c2):
        # sum in rows r1..r2, cols c1..c2 inclusive
        if r1 > r2 or c1 > c2:
            return 0
        return pre2[r2+1][c2+1] - pre2[r1][c2+1] - pre2[r2+1][c1] + pre2[r1][c1]
    
    ans = float('inf')
    
    for r1 in range(n):
        for r2 in range(r1+4, n):  # a >= 5, so r2-r1 >= 4
            # precompute col zeros between r1+1..r2-1
            # zeros in col c from r1+1 to r2-1 = (r2-1 - r1 - 1 + 1) - ones
            # = (r2-r1-1) - (col_pre[r2][c] - col_pre[r1+1][c])
            inner_rows = r2 - r1 - 1  # number of inner rows
            
            for c1 in range(m):
                # zeros in left col c1, rows r1+1..r2-1
                ones_lc = col_pre[r2][c1] - col_pre[r1+1][c1]
                left_cost = inner_rows - ones_lc
                
                # top row zeros c1+1..c2-1, bottom row zeros c1+1..c2-1
                # interior ones r1+1..r2-1, c1+1..c2-1
                # incrementally update as c2 increases
                
                for c2 in range(c1+3, m):  # b >= 4
                    ones_rc = col_pre[r2][c2] - col_pre[r1+1][c2]
                    right_cost = inner_rows - ones_rc
                    
                    # top row: zeros in row r1, cols c1+1..c2-1
                    top_ones = row_pre[r1][c2] - row_pre[r1][c1+1]
                    top_cost = (c2 - c1 - 1) - top_ones
                    
                    bot_ones = row_pre[r2][c2] - row_pre[r2][c1+1]
                    bot_cost = (c2 - c1 - 1) - bot_ones
                    
                    # interior ones
                    int_ones = rect_sum(r1+1, r2-1, c1+1, c2-1)
                    
                    cost = left_cost + right_cost + top_cost + bot_cost + int_ones
                    if cost < ans:
                        ans = cost
    
    print(ans)

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    solve()
